message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor "ユーザー" as User
boundary "ブラウザ" as Browser
control "web.php" as Web
control "JissyuController" as Ctrl

User -> Browser : 該当ページをリクエスト[/jissyu2]
Browser -> Web : GET[/jissyu2]
Web -> Ctrl : @index
Ctrl --> Browser

@enduml
